name: Broccoli & Cheese Barley Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Reduced fat cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven, combine water, broth, onion, barley, garlic, salt and pepper.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low; cover.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add broccoli and continue simmering for 15 to 20 minutes, or until barley and broccoli are tender.
6. Combine 1/2 cup milk and flour in a separate bowl, mixing until well blended.
7. Gradually stir the mixture into the soup with remaining milk and cheese.
8. Continue cooking over medium heat for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Add additional water or chicken broth if the soup becomes too thick when standing.
NOTE: To use Quick QUAKER Barley, substitute 2/3 cup quick barley for medium barley and decrease water to 3 cups. Combine all ingredients except milk, flour, and cheese in a 4-quart saucepan or Dutch oven. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer for 15 to 20 minutes until barley and broccoli are tender. Proceed with the remaining steps as directed above.
